text: Every morning, I wake up at 6:30 a.m. and start my day with a glass of water and a short meditation. After a quick breakfast, I prepare for work. I usually leave the house by 8 a.m. and spend my day at the office, handling emails and meetings until 5 p.m. In the evening, I prioritize exercise—either a 30-minute run or a yoga session at home. After dinner, I enjoy reading or watching a TV show to relax. This routine happens almost daily, and the consistency helps me stay productive and balanced. It’s simple, but it works for me.
